hooks.command: ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'git push' && git -C "$ROOT" diff --name-only origin/main HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^api/' && cd "$ROOT" && docker compose --profile tools run --rm lint || true

ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'git push' && git -C "$ROOT" diff --name-only origin/main HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^web/' && cd "$ROOT/web" && npm run typecheck && npm run lint || true
